mapper.select: SELECT item_id, user_id, image_path, item_name, price, description, created_at, updated_at FROM items
SELECT item_id, user_id, image_path, item_name, price, description, created_at, updated_at FROM items WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items ( user_id, image_path, item_name, price, description, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{imagePath}, #{itemName}, #{price}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET image_path = #{imagePath}, item_name = #{itemName}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
